assets.name: Cash / Savings Account
assets.flavourText: Safe but silent killer — inflation eats your savings while you sleep

assets.name: Swiss Government Bonds (CHF)
assets.flavourText: The Swiss safe haven. Boring, reliable, avoids losing everything to inflation

assets.name: EU Government Bonds (EUR)
assets.flavourText: Better yield than Swiss bonds, but Europe brings its own drama

assets.name: Corporate Bonds
assets.flavourText: Companies pay more than governments to borrow — because they're riskier

assets.name: Real Estate Fund (REIT)
assets.flavourText: Bricks and mortar in fund form. Great income, but you can't sell in a panic

assets.name: Swiss Index Fund (SMI)
assets.flavourText: Switzerland's top 20 companies in one fund. Cheap, diversified, but concentrated

assets.name: Global Index Fund (World ETF)
assets.flavourText: The whole world in one fund. The closest thing to owning everything

assets.name: Single Stocks
assets.flavourText: High return potential, high volatility, concentration risk

assets.name: Bitcoin / Crypto
assets.flavourText: Very high return potential, extreme volatility
